meta.title: Bolt Services Ltd | Project & CDM Site Management UK
meta.description: Bolt Services Ltd — nationwide Project and CDM Site Management for engineering and construction. Established 2017. Safe Contractor Approved. IOSH & SMSTS qualified.

hero.headline: Project & Site Management Services
hero.subheadline: Nationwide Project and CDM Site Management for the engineering and construction industries. Hands-on oversight, consistent quality, and full accountability.

about.heading: About Bolt Services
about.intro: Bolt Services Limited, established in 2017, provides nationwide Project and CDM Site Management services to the engineering and construction industries.
about.description: We differentiate ourselves through our hands-on approach, actively managing and supporting our managers to ensure consistent quality, accountability, and efficiency. This enables us to deliver a level of oversight and performance that goes beyond that typically offered by agencies or standard contract providers.

services.heading: Our Services
services.intro: We provide comprehensive project and site management, delivering consistent quality across the full project lifecycle.

items.title: Project Management
items.description: Full project management from Statement of Requirements through Detailed Design, Procurement, Construction Management, and Commissioning. Cost reporting, risk registers, and programme delivery.

items.title: CDM Site Management
items.description: Leading and managing on-site construction activities, ensuring compliance with project plans, specifications, and safety standards. Daily activity briefings to coordinate contractors.

items.title: Health & Safety
items.description: Implementing and enforcing HSE requirements to create a safe working environment. Risk management, regular toolbox talks, and monitoring that approved RAMS are followed.

items.title: Quality Control
items.description: Regularly inspecting work in progress to ensure it meets project specifications and quality standards. Proactive issue identification and resolution.

items.title: Communication & Reporting
items.description: Serving as the primary point of contact for stakeholders with regular updates on project progress, milestones, and issues. Weekly reports to PM and QSHE departments.

items.title: Additional Trade Services
items.description: Strong working relationships with a wide range of trades across various locations. If any task has been overlooked, we can help keep the project on track with cost-effective solutions.

stages.title: Statement of Requirements
stages.description: Establish the client's objectives and project requirements. Define scope, key deliverables, and success criteria.

stages.title: Basis of Design
stages.description: Develop the initial design concept. Establish preliminary programme and cost expectations. Assess feasibility and prepare the Risk Register.

stages.title: Detailed Design & Procurement
stages.description: Oversee detailed design development, structure competitive work packages for tender, manage procurement, and finalise the programme.

stages.title: Construction & Commissioning
stages.description: Manage project delivery during the construction phase. Monitor programme, cost, and quality throughout. Oversee commissioning and completion.

items.quote: I cannot state highly enough how impressed we have been with the work we have had done during the HV Rationalisation project as well as other projects. Both from an electrical and mechanical engineering point of view and H&S, project management and formal reporting. The costs have also represented value for money with the internal expertise that Bolt has.
items.author: Malcolm Brown

items.quote: GEA Refrigeration UK has been working with Bolt Services since 2018. The team at Bolt have thoroughly supported GEA by providing experienced site managers to work with the GEA contracts team on various large projects in the UK. GEA are always confident in the ability of Bolt to manage these areas effectively. The management team at Bolt are always on hand to support GEA project management & senior management with any requests, even last-minute ones!
items.author: Alyson Canning

team.heading: Meet the Team
team.intro: Our dedicated team are the backbone of our success, bringing expertise, commitment, and a strong safety focus to each project.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.intro: Ready to discuss your next project? Contact us today.
contact.address: 4 Hawthorn Way, St. Ives, Cambridgeshire, PE27 3YP

blog.heading: News & Insights
blog.intro: Stay up to date with the latest from Bolt Services.

posts.title: Welcome to Our New Website
posts.author: Bolt Services
posts.excerpt: We're excited to launch our brand new website, designed to better showcase our project and site management services and make it easier to get in touch.
posts.body:
We're excited to launch our brand new website, designed to better showcase our project and site management services and make it easier for clients to get in touch.

The new site features a modern design, detailed information about all of our services, and a simple contact form so you can reach us quickly.

We'll be using this blog to share project updates, industry news, and insights from our team. Stay tuned for more!
